name: upvpn-app
desc: UpVPN is the world's first Serverless VPN. The VPN app is available for macOS, Linux, Windows, tvOS, iOS, and Android. The UpVPN service can also be used with …
descFull: UpVPN is the world's first Serverless VPN. The VPN app is available for macOS, Linux, Windows, tvOS, iOS, and Android. The UpVPN service can also be used with any WireGuard-compatible client through the Web Device feature.
